allow: PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "READY status=$\($r.StatusCode\) length=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "NOT-READY-yet" })
